title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Books - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Landmark Books - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Landmark Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Landmark Books:
Landmark Books is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Books!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
